Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 82 

TEST_MDCR_PMT 

LABEL: Tests Medicare Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments for Part B tests for a given year. Claims for tests are a 
subset of the claims in the Part B carrier data file. 

These claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the first digit = “T.” The 
total Medicare payments are calculated as the sum
